title: Attention Is All You Need
abstract: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks.

title: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
abstract: We present high quality image synthesis results using diffusion probabilistic models.

title: An Old Format Paper on Algebraic Topology
abstract: We study spectral sequences arising from filtered complexes in algebraic topology.

title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers
A Cosmological Survey Outside Target Categories
abstract: We present observations of dark energy from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey.

title: Learning Transferable Visual Models From Natural Language Supervision
abstract: State-of-the-art computer vision systems are trained to predict a fixed set of predetermined object categories.

title: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
abstract: Deeper neural networks are more difficult to train due to vanishing gradients.

title: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
abstract: We demonstrate that scaling language models greatly improves task-agnostic few-shot performance.

title: Network Motifs in Biological Systems
abstract: Recurrent patterns of interconnections in biological networks constitute network motifs.

title: Efficient Estimation of Word Representations in Vector Space
abstract: We propose novel model architectures for computing continuous vector representations of words.
